title: install: need to install make on Fedora-like distros
body:
Somehow `make` fails to get brought in with all the build tools, so
explicitly install it.

Signed-off-by: Micah Abbott <miabbott@redhat.com>

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 018462b has been approved by `rhatdan`

I have no idea what is failing here, but this is not causing the internal error. Going to force merge.
